title: Mini Spear
description: Cleaner, sharper vanilla style spear iconsCleaner, sharper vanilla style spear icons
body:
![Mini Spear Small Spear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e7926aa3e96381b8790f97541c71aa32492b32a.png)

**Short description:** `Clean vanilla spear icons`

> A clean, vanilla friendly resource pack that makes spear icons sharper and more compact.

**Mini Spear** redesigns the item icons for **Wood, Stone, Copper, Iron, Gold, Diamond, and Netherite Spears**.

It keeps the vanilla look while making the sprites cleaner, slimmer, and easier to recognize in the hotbar and inventory. The pack is visual only and does not change gameplay.

## Overview

| Category | Details |
|:--|:--|
| **Edition** | Minecraft: Java Edition |
| **Pack Type** | Resource Pack |
| **Style** | Vanilla inspired |
| **Changes** | Spear item textures |
| **Gameplay Changes** | None |
| **Dependencies** | None required |

## Features

- [x] New icons for all 7 spear materials
- [x] Wooden, Stone, Copper, Iron, Golden, Diamond, and Netherite support
- [x] Cleaner and sharper pixel designs
- [x] Vanilla friendly look
- [x] Less bulky spear icons
- [x] No mods required
- [x] Visual changes only

## Why use Mini Spear?

Mini Spear is for players who want spear icons that look cleaner, slimmer, and easier to read while still fitting Minecraft's default style.

**~~Default spear icons~~ -> cleaner, sharper, and more compact spear icons.**

## Usage & Permissions

You may use this pack in videos, screenshots, modpacks, and personal setups as long as credit is given to **Yannis_**.

Please do not sell, reupload, or claim this pack as your own.
